import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def process_orders(orders):
    results = []
    for order in orders:
        total = calculate_total(order)
        if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG):
            logger.debug(
                "Order %s: customer=%s items=%d total=%.2f",
                order["id"],
                order["customer"],
                len(order["items"]),
                total,
            )
        results.append(total)
    return results

def sync_users(users):
    for user in users:
        if logger.isEnabledFor(logging.INFO):
            logger.info(
                "Syncing user id=%s name=%s email=%s",
                user.id,
                user.name,
                user.email,
            )
        update_remote(user)
